headline: Is Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Now Priced Fairly After Recent Consumer Staples Interest
summary: Wondering if Colgate-Palmolive stock at around US$88.84 still offers fair value or if you might be paying up for stability? This article breaks down what the current price could mean for you. The stock last closed at US$88.84, with returns of 1.7% over 7 days, 5.6% over 30 days, 14.4% year to date, 1.6% over 1 year, 19.7% over 3 years and 19.0% over 5 years, giving you several time frames to compare your own experience against.
